text:
Created attachment 154904
Patch to the ports tree

Update devel/visualparadigm to 12.0 build 20150401. This build fixes several problems including some bugs for database reverse engineering.

Attached poudriere logs for {8.4,9.3,10.1}amd64

Reported by Jean-François BOEUF. Thanks!
